name: CARV: A Diagnostic Benchmark for Compositional Analogical Reasoning in Multimodal LLMs
summary: arXiv:2603.27958v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Analogical reasoning tests a fundamental aspect of human cognition: mapping the relation from one pair of objects to another. Existing evaluation...
description: arXiv:2603.27958v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Analogical reasoning tests a fundamental aspect of human cognition: mapping the relation from one pair of objects to another. Existing evaluations of this ability in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) overlook the ability to compose rules from multiple sources, a critical component of higher-order intelligence. To close this gap, we intr...
author: Yongkang Du, Xiaohan Zou, Minhao Cheng, Lu Lin
